data.title: KiloEX exchange exploiter returns $5.5M days after $7.5M hack
data.description:
The hacker behind the $7. 5 million KiloEx exploit returned $5. 5 million worth of cryptocurrency just four days after the attack occurred. Decentralized exchange (DEX) KiloEx suspended platform operations after suffering a $7
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/kiloex-exploiter-returns-5-5-m-7-5-m-dex-exploit?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Data: Hyperliquid occupies nearly 70% of the on-chain perpetual contract market, with a trading volume of US$175 billion in March
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The decentralized perpetual contract protocol Hyperliquid has recently reached a market share of nearly 70%, a significant increase from the beginning of 2024. Its trading volume in March reached 175 billion US dollars, and in the first half of April it reached 83 billion US dollars. The protocol's trading volume has reached nearly 10% of Binance. (The Block)

data.title: Alphabet to Appeal SEC Ruling on Antitrust Allegations
data.description: According to PANews, a U.S. judge has ruled that the Department of Justice failed to demonstrate that Google's advertising tools and acquisition practices were anti-competitive in a case involving Alphabet. The parent company of Google, Alphabet, intends to appeal the unfavorable aspects of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) decision.

data.title: Solana defies activity drop, dominating 70% of blockchain revenue
data.description:
Solana continues to top blockchain revenue charts, even as activity on its network drops sharply. Data from Blockworks Research reveals that while memecoin activity on Solana has dropped by over 80% from its peak, the network’s applications still account for more than 70% of all on-chain revenue across the ecosystem.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/insights/solana-defies-activity-drop-dominating-70-of-blockchain-revenue/

data.title: US DOJ considers fairer repayment standards for crypto fraud victims
data.description:
The US DOJ is reassessing how digital asset fraud victims are repaid, noting that current regulations only return the asset's value at the time of loss.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/doj-repayment-crypto-fraud-victims/

data.title: KiloEx has recovered all stolen funds and said it will not pursue further investigation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement of KiloEx, the platform has successfully recovered all the stolen assets in this security incident, involving an amount of approximately 5.5 million US dollars. It is currently cooperating with judicial authorities and third-party experts to promote the formal closing of the case. At the same time, a 10% bounty will be issued to white hat hackers in accordance with the agreement. KiloEx stated that it will not pursue further legal responsibility and promised to continue to strengthen the security construction of the platform.

data.title: Hashkey takes aim at XRP ETF in Asia with new fund backed by Ripple
data.description:
Hong Kong-based crypto investment firm HashKey Capital has announced the launch of an XRP fund, with plans to convert it into an exchange-traded fund (ETF) in the future. According to an April 18 announcement, the fund, officially titled the HashKey XRP Tracker Fund, is reportedly “the first investment fund in Asia designed to track the performance of XRP. ”Furthermore, XRP developer Ripple will serve as the fund’s anchor investor, seeding the initial investment. In a separate X post, HashKey Capital said the fund aims to bring “more institutional capital into regulated XRP products and the broader digital asset ecosystem
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/hashkey-takes-aim-at-xrp-etf-in-asia-with-new-fund?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Paidun: KiloEx attackers have returned approximately $5.5 million in crypto assets
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Paidun monitoring, the attacker address marked in the KiloEx attack incident has returned about $5.5 million in crypto assets to KiloEx.

data.title: XT is listed on KSGEMS (KSGEMS), and the KSGEMS/USDT trading pair is opened in the Innovation Zone
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, XT is listed on KSGEMS (KSGEMS) and the KSGEMS/USDT trading pair is opened in the Innovation Zone. KSGEMS is committed to breaking through this limitation by combining blockchain technology with tokenization to bring broader accessibility, transparency and liquidity to gemstone investment. KSGEMS provides a platform where investors can invest in tokenized high-value gemstones that have performed as well as Bitcoin (BTC) in the past decade and earn income from them.

data.title: sUSD Drops Below $0.7 as Synthetix Stablecoin Faces Prolonged Depeg
data.description:
Synthetix's sUSD stablecoin has crashed below $0. 70 marking its worst depeg in years as collateral changes backfire.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/susd-drops-below-0-7-as-synthetix-stablecoin-faces-prolonged-depeg/
